case_title: INNSBRUCK, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
cause_of_action: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS (VERIFIED COMPLAINT FOR REFUND OF TRANSFER TAX)

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR STAY. GRANT PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE COURT EXECUTED THE PARTIES' STIPULATION AND ORDER, BUT THE COURT DID NOT SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THE STAY ONCE THE APPELLATE PROCEEDINGS ARE FINAL. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Stay.

GRANT pursuant to the parties' stipulation. The court executed the parties' stipulation and order, but the court did not set a case management conference. Plaintiff to seek relief from the stay once the appellate proceedings are final.

Order on stipulation to stay case filed on January 30, 2019.
